input.title: Job Portal Platform
input.description: Job Portal Platform is a web-based enterprise platform that centralizes operational workflows, data visibility, and cross-functional reporting.

user_classes.Admin: Configures the system, manages users, and oversees permissions and settings.
user_classes.Manager: Oversees departmental workflows, approvals, KPIs, and operational reporting.
user_classes.Employee: Performs day-to-day operational tasks within assigned modules and permissions.
user_classes.User: Generic authenticated platform user with access limited by role and department.

definitions.Admin: System user with full administrative privileges.
definitions.Manager: Operational owner of a department, module, or workflow.
definitions.Employee: End user performing role-specific business operations.

constraints: Initial release will focus on the web platform only
Role-based access control is mandatory across all modules
Operational data must be auditable and retained according to policy

operating_environment.frontend: Web-based interface built with Next.js and accessible through modern browsers.
operating_environment.backend: Service layer implemented with Express, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch for business operations.
operating_environment.deployment: Cloud-hosted environment with centralized monitoring, backups, and automated deployments.

NFR-01.title: Security and Access Control
requirements: All sensitive data must be encrypted in transit and at rest
Role-based authorization must restrict access by module and action
All authentication events and privileged actions must be logged

NFR-02.title: Performance and Scalability
requirements: Core pages and dashboards should load within acceptable enterprise SLAs
The platform must support concurrent usage across multiple departments
Background jobs and reporting workloads should not block transactional workflows

NFR-03.title: Reliability and Recoverability
requirements: Automated backups must run on a defined schedule
Critical workflows should support retry-safe processing and audit logging
Operational alerts should be generated for failures and degraded services

system_attributes.reliability: Platform should provide resilient transactional processing with backup and recovery capabilities.
system_attributes.scalability: Architecture should support horizontal scaling for APIs, background workers, and reporting services.
system_attributes.security: Authentication, authorization, encryption, and auditability must be built into every module.
system_attributes.maintainability: Codebase should remain modular, observable, and safe to extend through clear service boundaries.

out_of_scope: Native mobile applications in the first release
Large third-party marketplace or legacy ERP migrations unless explicitly scoped
Non-core experimental modules outside the platform's operational workflows

FR-01.title: Job Seeker Registration
requirements: Register with email and create profile
Upload resume in PDF or DOCX format
Add skills, experience, and education
Set job preferences for alerts

FR-02.title: Employer Registration
requirements: Register company with verification
Add company profile with logo and description
Company verification via business email domain
Multiple recruiter accounts per company

FR-03.title: Job Posting
requirements: Post job with title, description, requirements, and salary range
Set job type (full-time, part-time, contract, remote)
Add required skills and experience level
Set application deadline

FR-04.title: Job Search and Discovery
requirements: Search jobs by keyword, location, and skills
Filter by salary, job type, experience level, and date posted
Save searches for quick access
Recommended jobs based on profile

FR-05.title: Job Application
requirements: Apply with resume and cover letter
Track application status
Withdraw application before review
Receive notifications on status changes

FR-06.title: Applicant Tracking for Employers
requirements: View all applicants for a job posting
Filter applicants by skills and experience
Move applicants through hiring pipeline stages
Schedule interviews and send invitations

FR-07.title: Resume Builder
requirements: Guided resume builder with templates
Auto-fill from profile data
Multiple resume versions
Download as PDF

FR-08.title: Company Reviews
requirements: Employees can review companies anonymously
Rate work-life balance, salary, culture, and management
Company can respond to reviews
Reviews visible on company profile

FR-01.title: Design Job Seeker Registration UI
FR-01.description: Design the user interface for job seeker registration. Create the screens, forms, dashboards, or status views needed by the SRS and make the workflow clear, responsive, and accessible for the target users.
acceptance_criteria: UI design for job seeker registration is complete and reviewable.
The job seeker registration design is responsive and accessible.
The design for job seeker registration aligns with the documented user flow and validation states.

FR-01.title: Frontend Implementation of Job Seeker Registration
FR-01.description: Implement the frontend behavior for job seeker registration. Build the required user interactions, validation states, loading states, and error handling so the interface supports these behaviors: Register with email and create profile; Upload resume in PDF or DOCX format; Add skills, experience, and education.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend implements the required job seeker registration user interactions.
Validation, loading, and error states for job seeker registration are handled in the UI.
Frontend behavior for job seeker registration is integrated correctly with backend APIs.

FR-01.title: Backend Implementation of Job Seeker Registration
FR-01.description: Implement the backend logic for job seeker registration. Build the required APIs, business rules, validation, permissions, persistence, and processing needed to support these behaviors: Register with email and create profile; Upload resume in PDF or DOCX format; Add skills, experience, and education.
acceptance_criteria: Backend logic for job seeker registration is implemented and testable.
APIs and business rules for job seeker registration enforce validation and security requirements.
Data handling for job seeker registration is reliable and supports the required workflow.

FR-01.title: Database Design for Job Seeker Registration
FR-01.description: Design the data model and persistence strategy for job seeker registration. Define entities, relationships, indexes, retention rules, and migration changes needed to store and query the workflow reliably.
acceptance_criteria: The data model for job seeker registration supports the required workflow.
Relationships, constraints, and indexes for job seeker registration are defined correctly.
Schema changes for job seeker registration can be applied safely in target environments.

FR-01.title: Integrate Job Seeker Registration with External Services
FR-01.description: Integrate job seeker registration with the external services or providers referenced by the SRS. Implement secure service connections, payload validation, error handling, and recovery behavior for any third-party dependency involved in the workflow.
acceptance_criteria: External or cross-system integrations required by job seeker registration exchange the expected payloads successfully.
Retry, timeout, and failure handling for job seeker registration integrations are implemented and observable.
Credentials, tokens, and outbound calls used by job seeker registration are configured and secured correctly.

FR-01.title: Testing Job Seeker Registration Functionality
FR-01.description: Create and execute tests for job seeker registration. Cover the main success flows, failure scenarios, permission checks, validation rules, integrations, and operational edge cases described in the SRS so the implementation is safe to release.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover the main success and failure scenarios for job seeker registration.
Security, validation, and permission checks for job seeker registration are verified.
Regression coverage exists for the most important job seeker registration behaviors.
